title: Online Dentist
description: Full-stack MERN application with secure user authentication (JWT via httpOnly cookies), protected dashboard access, and cloud deployment using Vercel, Railway, and MongoDB Atlas.

title: Clinical System
description: Web system for medical clinic management, featuring patient registration, appointment scheduling, real-time administrative dashboard, and user authentication, developed with PHP8, MySQL, and Bootstrap. Live access available (email: igormtba@gmail.com / password: 123).

title: MicroServices
description: Microservices-based backend architecture built with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3, featuring independent Customer and Product services with separate PostgreSQL databases, containerized using Docker and documented with Swagger.

title: E-commerce Platform with Admin Panel
description: Integrated e-commerce and management system built with PHP, MySQL, and Docker, featuring a public website and an administrative dashboard. Live access available /sistema final url (email: igormtba@gmail.com / password: 123).
